posts.author: Raeeee (Chiang)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to do recurring task using timeline instead of due date? I used to use “duplicate group” and “Set Due Date today” to generate new task on daily & weekly basis.

However, my team request a timeline view to better visualize the timeline, so we want to replace due date with timeline. But there’s no option to [set “timeline” column to today]. Also I tested if I can make timeline to reflect due date, but it doesn’t work.

Has anyone figured out this or is there a better way to create recurring task?

Below are the two automations I am using to create recurring tasks.

螢幕快照 2023-04-17 下午09.13.35 上午1232×155 19.9 KB
